name: Yes Bank PaisaSave Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: First year free; renewal ₹499 waived on ₹1,00,000 annual spend

categoryRates.description: 1% cashback on all offline retail purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: Zero joining fee - no welcome benefit

additionalBenefits: Simple cashback model - no points to manage
pros: First year free with no joining fee
Simple 2% cashback on online spends is easy to understand
Direct cashback - no complex redemption needed
cons: Offline cashback of just 1% is low
Yes Bank's limited brand appeal compared to larger banks
idealFor: First-time credit card users wanting a simple cashback card
Online shoppers looking for a no-fee cashback card

faqs.question: Is this card really free?
faqs.answer: The first year is free with zero joining fee. From the second year, a ₹499 renewal fee applies, which is waived if you spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year.

faqs.question: How is cashback credited?
faqs.answer: Cashback is automatically credited to your statement within 1-2 billing cycles. No manual redemption needed.

faqs.question: Is 2% cashback on everything online?
faqs.answer: 2% cashback applies on most online transactions but is capped at ₹1,000 per month. Exclusions like wallet loading, EMI, and rent payments apply.
